item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Imagine living a life where people laugh and cheer at your hardship.
item.description: Edit: Posted this before the confirmation. Hm. Weird/sad life to lead where people sensationalize, politicize, laugh and cheer at ones death. I don't know if outreaches of empathy would be in keeping with his legacy. Maybe we choose to act ignobly, or maybe we choose to be respectful. Either way make sure it's healthy for YOU. Trump will do ANYTHING to distract the news cycle from his Epstein files.

item.description: You’ve all heard the recent news by now. No matter what side of the spectrum you’re on, I think we can all agree that this behavior is unacceptable. The suspect must be identified, apprehended and brought to justice. PLEASE HELP US FIND PHILLIES KAREN!!! It’s been, like, 5 days now. Also, here’s a picture of Charlie Kirk, who’s dead.

item.title: He was committed to the bit until the end and for what? To demonize an already persecuted, small group of people who simply want to live fulfilling lives that align with who they are?...
item.description: Well, I've got some news for you MAGA out there: trans people are not going away. Not now, not ever. They've been here for millennia, and will be around (hopefully thriving) for many years to come. I'm not sure there's an entirely tasteful way to say this, but you lost your life for nothing, Charlie. What a waste. PS: All that being said, we still need stricter gun control policies/laws, and better/more affordable healthcare for mental illness. 3,400 mass shootings in 10 years is just insane when you see it written down...
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: I personally didn't care much for Charlie Kirk, and while his death is tragic, the world just got a little more honest and a little less bigoted.
item.description: Sorry, not sorry.
item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.description: Hey it's a long story but if you want to catch up see my previous posts . So the court case is ongoing. Second session was much more substantial. They tried to put up that I abandoned the flat (that got shut down because I notified them). They tried to propose non payment but we countered with the documentation of the bank transfer not going through and the whole process to recover it from the bank that is ongoing because they put a claim on it (weird polish law). That got shot down. No proper eviction procedure was followed. They however asked for a continuance so there's a next one in two weeks. In ancillary shit I called my former military unit to see if they're sending me a letter to get ready to get called up to service because of the whole Russia thing and to confirm they send it to my new address (are military can be goofy when it comes to keeping up with paperwork unless THEY need it. It's definitely happening. Probably gonna have to report for re-classification next week in case things go hot. I am really struggling. Mental health be damned I lost that one in my first war. It's been bread and water just to keep up with the court costs since my job kinda sucks and looking for a better one is an ongoing process and a tedious one. This is all really really fucking exhausting. I would want to ask for help but honestly got no idea how. So that's where I'm at . Gonna sit here for a while since I don't see sleep coming tonight. So AMA if you want and I'll answer as best as possible
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.description: Couldn't happen to a nicer person. /S

item.dc:creator: kingbudo101

item.title: I'm tired boss, but there's still work to do.
item.description:
On June 14th of this year, a gunman entered the home of Minnesota State Representative Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark. At 3 o'clock in the morning, the coward entered the house and killed Melissa, Mark, and their Golden Retriever Gilbert, and gunned them down while they slept.
When Hortman and her husband were murdered, Trump, being the spoiled child that he is, threw a temper tantrum and refused to call Gov. Tim Walz. You know, the guy who ran against JD Vance as Kamala Harris's running partner? The guy who repeatedly humiliated both Trump and Vance while remaining civil, simply by pointing out truths? Yeah. Trump said "Fuck those Dems." and ignored what happened. https://apnews.com/article/trump-walz-minnesota-lawmakers-shot-call-064092d14bea4c3141da31b7a5e5c9b3
But now that Charlie Kirk is gone, Trump has decided to issue an order that all flags be flown at half mast for Kirk. For FOUR DAYS. Despite him not being a veteran, a government official, or a politician of any kind. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/sep/11/trump-administration-news-updates-today-latest
Why am I posting this? Because I was born in the USA. I've lived here my whole life. I'm old, and I'm tired. I've been through way too much, and for a while now I've been ready to call it a day. But that would be giving up. And I'd rather go down fighting, even if it's the most painful, horrific thing I'll ever experience. My entire family is from the Netherlands. During the Nazi occupation in WW2, my great grandfather stole a Nazi officer uniform, drove up to the gates of Amersfoort, and directed a prisoner transfer. Of his wife and their children. Who had been abducted by the Nazis weeks prior. They were shackled and placed in his car, and he drove off into the night. He did not resurface until well after the war ended. He, his wife, and his children survived. Half of my family did not. They died in concentration camps. In fear. In pain. In the most horrific ways anyone could ever imagine. Choking on poison gas. Starving to death. Raped. Beaten. Shot. My wife is Hispanic, born in Texas. We traced back her family at least 200 years, all of it in the USA. She's a citizen, more than I am. My parents were Dutch citizens in the US when I was born. I have birthright citizenship. But because I'm white, no one bats an eye. But she's asked on an almost weekly basis "Where are you from?" She's endured people screaming at her to go back home to Mexico. People yelling "Sieg Heil!" from their cars while doing a Nazi salute. In the face of all of this, how can I not fight? How can I leave to this to someone else, and hope for the best, when the woman I've loved for twenty five years is terrified of what tomorrow will bring? Terrified that if she goes to town alone, she won't come back. That I'll be left alone at home, waiting for her to come back, not knowing what happened to her. That ICE will ignore her status as a citizen, and she'll end up in prison for no reason at all. I'm old. I'm tired. I'm broken. But that doesn't matter, because I'm still here. Don't give up. Whatever you do, do not give up. It's already happening again, but we can stop it. The price we might have to pay is high, but for all you hold dear, for every person you love, do not give up. Please. Don't give up.
item.dc:creator: CallMeCourierSix

item.title: Brittney Nicole Leftridge. Her murder mattered but I have to see the face of someone who welcomed violence!
item.description:
My beautiful daughter. Shot in the back in 2020 by a “man” who claimed to love her. Not news…
He is white and has enough money to pay an attorney to get continuances. Not news…
If her murderer was an immigrant they would have her face everywhere to exploit my pain. But he was one of them… so not news. Most viral!! You guys are the best!!! Thank you Imgur! She introduced me to you and you keep her alive for me!!!

item.title: GOP3dofiles
item.dc:creator: ddeadpetals5

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1470 (tickety-boo)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Went to regular doctor yesterday, labs are normal, so whatever this is, its probably neurological.
Got a referral to the local sleep clinic, but the earliest appointment is gonna be January 5! January fucking 5th! I don't see myself affording my apartment for that long. Apparently, it's best to do the sleep tests at the same elevation that you actually, uh,, sleep at, so Phoenix or Flagstaff aren't options? (Why wasn't I told this five years ago for my two sleep tests I did in Prescott valley?)
Has anyone used/tried those mouthguard pieces or whatever they are? Do they work, or are they an absolute scam?
Anyway. I dreamed last night I was hired by this Timeline Preservation Society as a guard who was taxed with, well, protecting the historical timeline.
I was stationed at 610s AD Mecca as part of a team for protect Muhammad. Apparently you could really fuck up the timeline by changing things AFTER the time when Muhammad started getting his revelations. Before that point, apparently, timelines would pretty quickly snap back into "Normal," but after Muhammad, shit would hit the fan if you tried to change the timeline. Anyway, boring guard duty.
Except, when, you know, time-traveling Romaboos or Evangelist Fundimentalist Assassins came through looking to assassinate him. One time, they succeeded, and the timeline ended up with a Tlaxcalan invasion of Europe in 1700, resulting in deaths somehow worse than in our timeline. Though I'm pretty sure my brain took that from an Orson Scott Card Book before he went crazy....
I like the idea of becoming a bird rehabber that someone on here suggested, I thought about it, but I don't have the money for permits, but most importantly, I don't think I'd have the space in my Studio apartment. I'd have to *SUPER* specialize in, say Birds of Prey, or Songbirds, or just Quail.
I remember taking a duck with a broken wing that i rescued when I was a teenager to a rehabber during baby Quail season and seeing just... aquarium tanks of hatchling baby Quail on almost every surface, the individual peeps and squeaks becoming the cutest thunderous roar that filled the background sound like waves by the seashore. Just. Hundreds of them. Everywhere. (But I bet they'd clean Pippin's trash he throws everywhere from his food bowl?)
Also tangent: why are so many sci-fi/fantasy writers either Sex Pests or absolute political shitheads?
Anyway. Debating whether to push the car and go birding this morning atop Mingus Mountain, or play things super safe and just stay home and play computer games and fill out job applications, or contemplate which of my legs I don't *really* need to make the disability application process easier.
Soooo many worries.
I wonder what bizarre birds lived in Antarctic cloud forests before the ice came.
Hottest club music of the year.
As a Godwit, you have to survive the apocalypse by flying nonstop from Alaska to New Zealand across the sea. It's like an unholy oceanic version of Desert Bus that takes four days nonstop to play.
New shoes dropped for @xbadxfaeriex
Here? Here?
This is where the Evangelicals are going to end up.
It sure as fuck beats Andrew Tate.
Honestly, that sounds like a fun party game.
PISSPOWER
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "boy! Cody! What. What. What. What. Boy! Boy! What doing? [Kissing noises]" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: Today I Found Out About Numbats
item.description:
Numbats are a marsupial from Australia, but quite distantly related to other marsupials, having diverged 32-42 million years ago. They are the only member of their genus (Myrmecobius) and seem to be cute as a button.
Sadly they are incredibly endangered, if you ask google how many there are a shitty AI will tell you they are down to around 1000 individuals, but that number is from the 1970s and AI can't tell time and is bad. Since then there have been reintroduction projects and populations preserved in predator proof reserves.
Predation is really their main problem, like a lot of native wildlife they get fucked up by feral cats and foxes which have no business being in Australia, being as they were introduced by feral Europeans.
They mostly eat termites, and have evolved the OP long sticky tongue to do the job, like an anteater. But so far they've managed to avoid the silly long face and butthole mouth we all associate with anteaters.
That's pretty much all I know about them at this point. This one is carrying leaves. The hell is it up to. Do they build nests? Big if true.
This one is being weird.
Ok they might just be weird all the time.
item.dc:creator: TheGhostofElizabethShue

item.title: He Hires The Best People/Scum Bags
item.description: Dr. Michael Kirk Moore is a Utah plastic surgeon who was recently on trial for allegedly operating a COVID-19 vaccine fraud scheme. In July 2025, during his trial, the U.S. Department of Justice dismissed all federal charges against him and his co-defendants. The federal charges, originally filed in 2023, included: Destroying more than $28,000 worth of government-provided COVID-19 vaccines. Selling fake vaccination cards for $50 each or a required donation, with prosecutors alleging that Moore's practice sold nearly 2,000 fraudulent cards. Administering saline injections to minors at their parents' request, leading the children to believe they had received a vaccine. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy0w1p0wq87o.amp
item.dc:creator: WhenWillThenBeNowSoon

item.title: Pixie & Brutus: Wall
item.description: Today's Tiabeanie Tax; Beanie and her crinkle ball. She loves balls of all shapes and sizes. I caught this in the middle of her being wild and crazy.
